root.title: Omniprise — Gastronomic Brands Platform
root.description: Omniprise is a food service operator created to develop, operate, and integrate high-impact brands in Paraguay.
root.ogDescription: Food service operator with 7 brands, 17 locations, and presence in 6 cities.
root.twitterDescription: Food service operator with 7 brands, 17 locations, and presence in 6 cities in Paraguay.

hero.subtitleSuffix: focused on scale, efficiency, and sustained growth.

statement.p1: Combining physical restaurants, dark kitchens, delivery, and mass consumption channels. Founded in late 2024, Omniprise accelerated its development throughout 2025 and took a
statement.p2: , incorporating well-established brands into its portfolio through acquisition — consolidating as an

pillars.desc1: We develop gastronomic concepts with strong identity, designed to scale from day one.
pillars.desc2: We bring in brands with proven traction and integrate them into our operational platform to accelerate growth.
pillars.desc3: We grow with physical locations and dark kitchens, combining territorial presence with massive delivery coverage.
pillars.desc4: Strong focus on digital platforms and frequent consumption, generating volume and predictability.
pillars.desc5: Projection toward mass consumption channels: supermarkets, convenience stores, and sports venues.
pillars.desc6: Centralization of purchasing, processes, and standards to generate volume, efficiency, and long-term relationships.

brands.description: 7 active brands in 6 cities. From high-impact thematic experiences to high-turnover kitchens.

brandDetail.ctaDescription: Operate {brandName} with the full backing of Omniprise. Technology, training, marketing, and supply chain from day one.

franchisePage.heroDescription: Operate a proven gastronomic brand with full backing in operations, technology, and marketing.
franchisePage.benefitDesc1: Each brand already operates successfully. You're not experimenting — you're replicating a system that works.
franchisePage.benefitDesc2: Access to our dashboard with real-time metrics. Data-driven decisions, not intuition.
franchisePage.benefitDesc3: Operational, gastronomic, and service training. Your team starts with real knowledge.
franchisePage.benefitDesc4: Optimized supplier network. Better prices, better quality, no headaches.
franchisePage.benefitDesc5: POS, inventory, reporting, and more. All integrated from day one.
franchisePage.benefitDesc6: Centralized marketing strategy with content, campaigns, and digital presence included.
franchisePage.process1Desc: Complete the form with your information and brand preferences.
franchisePage.process2Desc: We analyze your profile, location, and compatibility with our brands.
franchisePage.process3Desc: Receive brand options, commercial conditions, and financial projections.
franchisePage.process4Desc: Store opening with full training, technology, and operational support.
franchisePage.faq1Q: What types of brands do you franchise?
franchisePage.faq1A: We offer 7 proven gastronomic brands: UFO, Mr. Chow, Rocco, PastaBox, Sammy's Express Pizza, Barrio Pizzero, and Los Condenados. Each has a unique concept and validated operational model.
franchisePage.faq2A: Investment varies by brand and location. It includes franchise fee, equipment, training, and working capital. We present detailed projections during the evaluation process.
franchisePage.faq3A: It's not required. Our training program covers everything needed. What we do look for are entrepreneurial profiles committed to operational excellence.
franchisePage.faq4Q: How long does it take to open a location?
franchisePage.faq4A: From signing the agreement, the process takes 60 to 90 days. It includes training, store setup, and operational launch.
franchisePage.faq5Q: What support do I receive as a franchisee?
franchisePage.faq5A: Comprehensive support: continuous training, technology (POS, dashboard, inventory), marketing, supply chain, and a dedicated operational supervision team.
franchisePage.faq6Q: Can I operate more than one brand?
franchisePage.faq6A: Yes. Many of our partners operate multiple brands. We evaluate each case to ensure viability and necessary focus.
franchisePage.ctaDescription: Complete the application in under 5 minutes. Our team will contact you within 24 business hours.

privacidadPage.section1Body: The data controller for personal data collected through this website is Omniprise S.A., based in Asunción, Paraguay. You can contact us at info@omniprise.com.py.
privacidadPage.section2Intro: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through our website forms:
privacidadPage.section2Item1: Contact form: name, email, company, and message.
privacidadPage.section2Item2: Franchise form: first name, last name, email, phone, city, country, brand of interest, previous experience, investment range, location availability, motivation, and how you found us.
privacidadPage.section3Intro: We use your personal data exclusively to:
privacidadPage.section3Item1: Respond to inquiries made through the contact form.
privacidadPage.section3Item2: Evaluate franchise applications and contact potential candidates.
privacidadPage.section3Item3: Send relevant information about the franchise process when requested.
privacidadPage.section4Body: The processing of your data is based on your express consent when submitting our forms. This consent is free, prior, and informed, in accordance with the National Constitution of Paraguay (Art. 33) on the right to privacy, Law No. 4868/2013 on Electronic Commerce, and general data protection principles in force in the Republic of Paraguay.
privacidadPage.section5Body1: Forms on this site are processed by Formspree, a form processing service based in the United States. Data submitted through forms is transmitted to Formspree servers for subsequent forwarding to our corporate email. Formspree complies with internationally recognized security and privacy standards.
privacidadPage.section5Body2: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacidadPage.section6Body: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected. Franchise applications are retained for a maximum of 2 years from receipt, unless you request deletion beforehand.
privacidadPage.section7Intro: As the owner of your personal data, you have the right to:
privacidadPage.section7Item1: Access: request information about the personal data we hold about you.
privacidadPage.section7Item2: Rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacidadPage.section7Item3: Deletion: request deletion of your personal data from our records.
privacidadPage.section7Item4: Objection: object to the processing of your data at any time.
privacidadPage.section7Item5: Revocation of consent: withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
privacidadPage.section7Outro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@omniprise.com.py. We will respond within 10 business days.
privacidadPage.section8Body: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, or alteration. Our website uses HTTPS encryption for data transmission.
privacidadPage.section9Body: We use Vercel Analytics to collect anonymous and aggregated navigation data (pages visited, time spent, general region). This information does not personally identify the user and is used exclusively to improve the browsing experience on our site.
privacidadPage.section10Body: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on this website. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
privacidadPage.section11Intro: For any questions related to this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data, you can contact us at:
